assertionResults.title: Add valid relay connects pump and renders row
assertionResults.reason: Dedicated relay-list sidebar tests passed for valid add behavior, and relay churn e2e confirms live relay hot-reload behavior under runtime load.

steps.action: Run targeted vitest relay suites and relay churn Playwright spec
steps.expected: Valid add path updates relay list/hot-reload behavior without regression
steps.observed: SettingsSidebar relay-list suite and relay churn e2e both passed

assertionResults.title: Add invalid relay URL rejected
assertionResults.reason: Passing relay URL validation + sidebar tests explicitly cover invalid URL and malformed input rejection.

steps.expected: Invalid relay inputs are blocked with canonical errors
steps.observed: All invalid URL rejection checks passed

assertionResults.title: Remove relay disconnects socket and removes dashboard row
assertionResults.reason: Settings sidebar relay-list suite and runtime relay-pump suite passed remove/diff-path assertions including clean close behavior.

steps.expected: Removing a relay updates list and cleanly tears down removed socket path
steps.observed: All remove + clean close assertions passed

assertionResults.title: Edit existing relay URL reconnects to new URL
assertionResults.reason: Relay-list sidebar edit behavior and relay-pump incremental update path both passed in executable tests.

steps.expected: Edit path updates relay URL and preserves untouched subscriptions

assertionResults.title: Relay list persists across Lock / Unlock / Reload
assertionResults.reason: Direct agent-browser flow configured 3 relays, then validated same ordered relay list after lock/unlock and after full reload+unlock, with IndexedDB snapshots matching exactly.

steps.action: Create profile with relays wss://relay.primal.net, wss://relay.damus.io, wss://nos.lol and open Settings
steps.expected: Settings relay list shows all 3 relays in configured order

steps.observed: Relay list order unchanged after unlock

steps.action: Full page reload, unlock again, reopen Settings, read IndexedDB
steps.expected: Same ordered 3-relay list in UI and IndexedDB relays array
steps.observed: UI order unchanged and IndexedDB relays remained [primal, damus, nos.lol]

assertionResults.title: Latency column shows numeric ms once relay responds
assertionResults.reason: Relay health and telemetry suites passed numeric latency rendering/instrumentation checks.

steps.action: Run relay health + telemetry vitest suites
steps.expected: Latency renders numeric ms from real telemetry path

assertionResults.title: Events column increments as inbound events arrive
assertionResults.reason: Passing relay health/browser telemetry/runtime pump telemetry tests cover event counter increments and reconnect reset behavior.

steps.action: Run relay health + browser relay telemetry + pump telemetry suites
steps.expected: Per-relay inbound EVENT counters increment and remain independent

assertionResults.title: Last-Seen column shows real relative time
assertionResults.reason: Relay health + relay telemetry formatter tests passed relative-time behavior and update semantics.

steps.action: Run relay health and relay telemetry suites
steps.expected: Last Seen uses relative time semantics and updates/reset correctly

assertionResults.title: Degraded relay shows Slow (amber) status
assertionResults.reason: Relay health mapper and telemetry/pump tests passed slow-threshold + consecutive-sample transition checks.

steps.action: Run relay health + relay telemetry + pump telemetry suites
steps.expected: Slow state appears on sustained high RTT and clears after recovery

assertionResults.title: Disconnected relay shows Offline (red) with real last-seen
assertionResults.reason: Dedicated relay health row test for VAL-SETTINGS-014 passed offline status + real last-seen + frozen latency behavior.

steps.expected: Offline row preserves real last-seen/frozen latency semantics

assertionResults.title: Relay list hot-reload does not leak or double-subscribe
assertionResults.reason: Runtime relay pump updateRelays tests and relay-churn multi-device Playwright spec both passed, covering no duplicate-subscription and untouched-socket invariants.

steps.action: Run runtimeRelayPump updateRelays suite and relay-churn e2e
steps.expected: Incremental hot-reload without leaks/duplicate REQ on untouched relays
steps.observed: No duplicate subscription regressions; assertions passed

assertionResults.title: Duplicate relay URL rejected
assertionResults.reason: Duplicate rejection coverage passed in both URL validation and settings sidebar relay-list tests.

assertionResults.title: Relay churn mid-sign (M1 + M4 + M5)
assertionResults.reason: Dedicated multi-device relay-churn Playwright spec passed end-to-end, validating churn-mid-sign behavior and no silent hang.

steps.action: Run relay-churn multi-device Playwright spec with desktop project and single worker
steps.expected: Churn mid-sign recovers/finishes without silent hang and without duplicate untouched sockets

summary: Validated 13 assigned assertions: 13 pass, 0 fail, 0 blocked. Evidence includes targeted vitest relay suites, relay-churn Playwright run, and direct agent-browser + IndexedDB persistence proof for VAL-SETTINGS-007.

frictions.description: agent-browser element refs changed after route/state transitions (create flow, unlock, reload), requiring re-snapshot before continued interaction.
frictions.resolution: Re-snapshotted before each next interaction and completed full VAL-SETTINGS-007 lock/unlock/reload evidence flow.

frictions.description: relay-churn Playwright log captured expected connection-refused console lines for decoy relay endpoints used by the spec harness.
frictions.resolution: Continued because the spec explicitly passed and this behavior is part of churn harness conditions.
